servers.name: nmap-mcp
servers.description: Network reconnaissance using Nmap - port scanning, service detection, OS fingerprinting

servers.name: binwalk-mcp
servers.description: Firmware extraction and analysis using Binwalk - file signatures, entropy analysis, embedded file extraction

servers.name: yara-mcp
servers.description: Pattern matching and malware classification using YARA rules

servers.name: capa-mcp
servers.description: Static capability detection using capa - identifies malware capabilities in binaries

servers.name: radare2-mcp
servers.description: Binary analysis and reverse engineering using radare2

servers.name: ghidra-mcp
servers.description: Advanced binary decompilation and reverse engineering using Ghidra

servers.name: searchsploit-mcp
servers.description: CVE and exploit search using SearchSploit / Exploit-DB

servers.name: trivy-mcp
servers.description: Container and filesystem vulnerability scanning using Trivy

servers.name: gitleaks-mcp
servers.description: Secret and credential detection in code and firmware using Gitleaks
